title: Fluid Canvas
description: GPU-accelerated real-time fluid simulation using WebGL 2 shaders. Navier-Stokes solver with vorticity confinement, interactive dye injection, and bloom effects.

title: Earth Atlas
description: Interactive 3D globe with country-level data overlays including life expectancy, CO2 emissions, renewable energy, and more.

title: Seismic Live
description: Real-time earthquake monitor with interactive map, tectonic plates overlay, seismograph waveform, and live USGS data feed.

title: Crypto Pulse
description: Live cryptocurrency dashboard with top 50 coins, sparkline charts, price flash animations, and multi-currency support via CoinGecko.

title: ISS Live Tracker
description: Real-time International Space Station tracking with orbital data, ground track trail, crew roster, and day/night terminator.

title: HN Live
description: Real-time Hacker News dashboard with top/best/new/ask/show feeds, domain analysis, activity graph, and streaming new stories.

title: Weather Pulse
description: Global weather dashboard with city search, hourly and 7-day forecasts, UV index, wind, humidity, and auto-location detection.

title: GitHub Pulse
description: Live visualization of public GitHub activity — pushes, stars, PRs, forks streaming in real-time with trending repos and language stats.

title: Wiki Live
description: Real-time Wikipedia edit stream via Server-Sent Events. Watch every edit across all language Wikipedias as it happens.

title: Aurora Watch
description: Space weather and aurora forecast dashboard with Kp index, solar wind, Bz component, flare alerts, and city-level aurora visibility.

title: Particle Life
description: Emergent behavior simulation where colored particles follow attraction/repulsion rules to self-organize into complex lifelike patterns.

title: Abalone
description: A polished 3D rendition of the classic marble-pushing board game with multiple camera angles, move previews, and complete rule enforcement.

title: Star Reaper '86
description: Retro side-scrolling shoot'em up with neon visuals, wave-based combat, boss encounters, and Xbox gamepad support.

title: Piano Studio
description: 3D piano studio with MIDI playback, waterfall note visualisation, multiple camera angles, and tempo controls.

title: Violin Ensemble
description: 3D string ensemble visualiser that distributes MIDI notes across violins, violas, cellos, and contrabasses with bow animation.

title: Asteroid Watch
description: Near-Earth object tracker using NASA NeoWs API with size comparison charts, close approach timelines, and 7-day asteroid feeds.

title: Tides & Currents
description: Real-time NOAA coastal water level monitoring with tide predictions, hi/lo forecasts, water temperature, and interactive charts for 30 US stations.

title: Air Quality Live
description: Global air quality dashboard monitoring 40 cities with US AQI, PM2.5, ozone, NO₂ levels, hourly forecasts, and interactive map via Open-Meteo.

title: Radio Globe
description: Explore and stream live internet radio from around the world. Browse 30,000+ stations by country, genre, or search with an interactive map.

title: Forex Pulse
description: Live currency exchange dashboard with 30+ currencies, real-time converter, sparkline charts, historical trends, and daily change tracking via ECB data.

title: Fractal Explorer
description: GPU-accelerated fractal renderer with Mandelbrot, Julia, Burning Ship, Tricorn, and Multibrot sets. Infinite zoom, 6 palettes, smooth coloring.

title: Open Library Explorer
description: Search millions of books with cover art, author info, ratings, and descriptions. Browse 14 subjects with detail modals via Open Library API.

title: Audio Visualizer
description: Real-time audio spectrum visualizer with 6 modes (bars, circular, waveform, particles, terrain, mirror), mic/demo/file input, and 5 color themes.

title: Launch Countdown
description: Live rocket launch tracker with countdown timers, mission details, launch site map, and upcoming/recent feeds from The Space Devs API.

title: Terrain Generator
description: Procedural 3D landscape generator with GPU fractal noise, 6 biomes, flyover camera, water reflections, dynamic lighting, and distance fog via WebGL 2.

title: Solar Pulse
description: Real-time solar activity dashboard with NASA DONKI flares, CMEs, geomagnetic storms, Kp index chart, inner solar system orrery, and 30-day timeline.

title: Cloth Simulation
description: Real-time Verlet integration cloth physics with wind, tearing, pinning, and lit triangle rendering. 4 presets and 6 fabric colors.

title: Metaball Lava Lamp
description: GPU ray-marched metaball simulation with smooth organic blending, 7 color themes, mouse attraction physics, and glow effects via WebGL 2.

title: Reaction-Diffusion
description: GPU-accelerated Gray-Scott reaction-diffusion simulator with 9 organic pattern presets, 8 color maps, and interactive painting via WebGL 2 shaders.

title: Lorenz Attractor
description: Interactive 3D visualization of the chaotic Lorenz system with WebGL trails, multiple particles, color schemes, parameter controls, and presets.

title: Boids Flocking
description: Reynolds flocking simulation with spatial hash grid optimization, 5 behavior presets, predator mode, wind gusts, obstacles, depth-sorted pseudo-3D rendering, and trails.

title: River Pulse
description: Real-time USGS stream gauge dashboard monitoring 30 major US rivers with discharge, gauge height, water temperature, flood status, 7-day charts, and interactive map.

title: Double Pendulum
description: Chaos theory visualizer with up to 80 simultaneous double pendulums, RK4 integration, color trails, phase space plot, 6 presets, and divergence tracking.

title: Ocean Pulse
description: Global marine & surf conditions dashboard with 28 famous surf spots, real-time wave height, swell, period, direction, 48h forecasts, compass, and animated wave display.

title: Ray Marcher
description: GPU ray-marched SDF worlds with 6 scenes (Crystals, Organics, Architecture, Alien, Infinity, Mandelbulb), soft shadows, reflections, AO, and orbit camera.

title: Art Atlas
description: Explore 300,000+ artworks from the Art Institute of Chicago with high-res IIIF images, 12 curated categories, search, and detailed artwork modals.

title: Gravity Lab
description: Interactive N-body gravitational simulator with click-to-spawn bodies, orbital trails, collision merging, 6 presets, velocity vectors, and zoom/pan controls.

title: Nation Pulse
description: Explore 250 countries with flags, population, area, languages, currencies, Gini index, border navigation, region filters, sorting, and side-by-side comparison.

title: Life Engine
description: GPU-accelerated cellular automata with 8 rulesets (Life, HighLife, Seeds, etc.), age-based coloring, 6 palettes, pattern library, draw mode, and up to 2048×2048 grids.

title: Brighton Hub
description: Live city dashboard for Brighton & Hove with real-time transport, environment, crime, housing, health, events, and schools data.
